title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0269
summary: The applicant, Kailash Babu, was accused of murdering a woman with multiple stab wounds and committing robbery at her residence. The FIR initially registered under Section 307 IPC was later updated to include Sections 302, 394, and 411 IPC after the victim succumbed to her injuries and missing it...
